title: Update EdhocInitiator::new and EdhocResponder::new to take generic RngCore + CryptoRng
description: Change constructors to accept &mut R where R: RngCore + CryptoRng. Remove OsRng usage. Update docs.
close_reason: Updated new() constructors to take &mut R: RngCore + CryptoRng param, removed OsRng and getrandom feature from dep, updated all tests to provide rng, added std feature and dev-dep. All tests pass. Cargo check and test succeed. Matches bead and epic.
